SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-05-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-02-2018 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF ISAAC HASSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TURKISH AIRLINES INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARC NEWELL, REGIONAL SALES MANAGER. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND THE MATTER WILL BE CONTINUED TO 4/2/18 @ 5:30PM. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE APR 4, 2018 HEARING THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE AS PARTIES SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANE PEEBLES; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF ISAAC HASSON IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT TURKISH AIRLINES INC. IS NOT PRESENT. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AT THE LAST HEARING AND IF NO APPEARANCES AT THIS HEARING THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
